name: 8point3 Energy Partners LP
description: 8point3 Energy Partners LP was a growth-oriented limited partnership formed by First Solar, Inc. and SunPower Corporation to own, operate, and acquire solar energy generation projects. The company's primary objective was to generate stable and growing cash distributions by acquiring high-quality solar assets with long-term utility, commercial, and residential power purchase agreements. In 2018, the partnership was acquired by Capital Dynamics.
